name: join-error-non-vec-subject
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :JoinSubjectNotVec :message "join requires Vec of Strings subject, got Number" :operand "join" :position "subject" :expectedType "Vec of Strings" :actualType "Number" :actualValue 42 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "join" :args [{ :qlang/kind :StringLit :value "," :text "\",\"" :location { :start { :offset 10 :line 1 :column 11 } :end { :offset 13 :line 1 :column 14 } } }] :effectful false :text "join(\",\")" :location { :start { :offset 5 :line 1 :column 6 } :end { :offset 14 :line 1 :column 15 } } } :input 42 } :trail [] }

name: join-error-string-subject
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :JoinSubjectNotVec :message "join requires Vec of Strings subject, got String" :operand "join" :position "subject" :expectedType "Vec of Strings" :actualType "String" :actualValue "abc" :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "join" :args [{ :qlang/kind :StringLit :value "," :text "\",\"" :location { :start { :offset 13 :line 1 :column 14 } :end { :offset 16 :line 1 :column 17 } } }] :effectful false :text "join(\",\")" :location { :start { :offset 8 :line 1 :column 9 } :end { :offset 17 :line 1 :column 18 } } } :input "abc" } :trail [] }

name: join-error-element-not-string
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :JoinElementNotString :message "join: element 1 expects String, got Number" :operand "join" :index 1 :expectedType "String" :actualType "Number" :actualValue 42 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "join" :args [{ :qlang/kind :StringLit :value "," :text "\",\"" :location { :start { :offset 20 :line 1 :column 21 } :end { :offset 23 :line 1 :column 24 } } }] :effectful false :text "join(\",\")" :location { :start { :offset 15 :line 1 :column 16 } :end { :offset 24 :line 1 :column 25 } } } :input ["a" 42 "c"] } :trail [] }

name: join-error-element-null
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :JoinElementNotString :message "join: element 1 expects String, got Null" :operand "join" :index 1 :expectedType "String" :actualType "Null" :actualValue null :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "join" :args [{ :qlang/kind :StringLit :value "," :text "\",\"" :location { :start { :offset 22 :line 1 :column 23 } :end { :offset 25 :line 1 :column 26 } } }] :effectful false :text "join(\",\")" :location { :start { :offset 17 :line 1 :column 18 } :end { :offset 26 :line 1 :column 27 } } } :input ["a" null "c"] } :trail [] }

name: join-error-non-string-separator
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :JoinSeparatorNotString :message "join expects String at position 2, got Number" :operand "join" :position 2 :expectedType "String" :actualType "Number" :actualValue 42 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "join" :args [{ :qlang/kind :NumberLit :value 42 :text "42" :location { :start { :offset 17 :line 1 :column 18 } :end { :offset 19 :line 1 :column 20 } } }] :effectful false :text "join(42)" :location { :start { :offset 12 :line 1 :column 13 } :end { :offset 20 :line 1 :column 21 } } } :input ["a" "b"] } :trail [] }

name: join-error-keyword-separator
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :JoinSeparatorNotString :message "join expects String at position 2, got Keyword" :operand "join" :position 2 :expectedType "String" :actualType "Keyword" :actualValue :foo :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "join" :args [{ :qlang/kind :Keyword :name "foo" :text ":foo" :location { :start { :offset 17 :line 1 :column 18 } :end { :offset 21 :line 1 :column 22 } } }] :effectful false :text "join(:foo)" :location { :start { :offset 12 :line 1 :column 13 } :end { :offset 22 :line 1 :column 23 } } } :input ["a" "b"] } :trail [] }
